channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - AI & Machine Learning
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: AI & Machine Learning

item.title: The Israeli IBD Research Nucleus: collaborative advancements in Israeli IBD research.
item.description: Therapeutic advances in gastroenterology - Review - Inflammatory bowel diseases (IBD) are increasing worldwide, requiring multidisciplinary care and coordinated research infrastructures. Leveraging Israel's integrated healthcare system with IBD cent...

item.title: Human gut flagellome profiling using FlaPro reveals TLR5-related phenotype-specific alterations in IBD.
item.description: Gut microbes - Flagellin, the structural protein of bacterial flagella, activates the innate immune receptor Toll-like receptor 5 (TLR5). However, the ability of different flagellins to bind and stimulate TLR5 va...

item.title: Reconstructing the intestinal microbiota ecological network based on graph neural network and contrastive learning: Predicting key microbiota regulatory targets in Crohn's Disease.
item.description: Computational biology and chemistry - Crohn's disease (CD) is a heterogeneous inflammatory bowel disease in which microbial, metabolic, and host factors interact dynamically. Therefore, we aimed to (i) integrate microbiota, metabolite,...

item.title: AI-Powered Discovery of Rosmarinic Acid as a Novel Ferroptosis Inhibitor for Ulcerative Colitis via Targeting the ALOX15-VDAC1 Axis.
item.description: Research (Washington, D.C.) - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic inflammatory bowel disease with limited mechanism-based therapies, and ferroptosis-an iron-dependent lipid peroxidation-driven cell death-has emerged as a criti...

item.title: Scleral image analysis via artificial intelligence to evaluate inflammatory status in inflammatory bowel disease.
item.description: International journal of colorectal disease - Among the extraintestinal ocular manifestations of patients with inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), episcleritis is associated with the inflammatory activity of IBD. The use of artificial intelligen...

item.title: Machine Learning for Colitis-Associated Cancer in Inflammatory Bowel Disease: Evidence and Future Directions Toward Precision Medicine, a Narrative Review.
item.description: International journal of molecular sciences - Review - Colitis-associated cancer (CAC) represents a major long-term complication in patients with ulcerative colitis (UC) and Crohn's disease (CD), the two main forms of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). ...

item.title: Agentic artificial intelligence in inflammatory bowel disease: toward autonomous and adaptive care.
item.description: Crohn's & colitis 360 - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) is a chronic, heterogeneous condition requiring ongoing monitoring and iterative therapeutic adjustment. Current management relies on multiple clinical, biochemical...
